subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-02-11 in Paris
subcodes.first_line: Notwithstanding that the Jews had made a pact with Muhammad, a pact which guaranteed the protection of the Jews
subcodes.first_line_orig: با وجود آنکه یهودیان معاهده نموده بودند با حضرت که دست از پا خطا نکنند
subcodes.subjects: @episodes from the early history of Islam
